title: Update automation image to 2026-06-16

comments.body: Can one of you please properly approve the PR via the github UI, we cannot merge without one actual approve due to merge protection settings.
I'm not seeing an "Approve" button to push on this PR @Luap99 ...
Just the normal github review settings you need to go to the changes, right top click submit review and then select approve there
